nasb.text: But Samuel said, “What have you done?” And Saul said, “Because I saw that the people were scattering from me, and that you did not come within the appointed days, and that the Philistines were assembling at Michmash,

esv.text: Samuel said, “What have you done?” And Saul said, “When I saw that the people were scattering from me, and that you did not come within the days appointed, and that the Philistines had mustered at Michmash,

cnv.text: 撒母耳說：“你作了甚麼事？”掃羅回答：“因為我看見眾民都離開我散去了，你又沒有照所定的日子來到，而非利士人正在密抹聚集起來。

ccb.text: 撒母耳对扫罗说：“你做的是什么事？”扫罗答道：“我看见手下的人不断离我而去，你到了约定的时候还没有来，而且非利士人就聚集在密抹。
